title: Bocquillonia codonostylis
taxonomy: Bocquillonia codonostylis is a species of flowering plant in the family Rhizophoraceae. It belongs to the genus Bocquillonia, which contains a small number of species native to tropical Asia. The family Rhizophoraceae comprises around 150 species of plants, commonly known as mangrove or mangrove family. Bocquillonia codonostylis is typically classified as a shrub or small tree. Its classification is used in botany to identify and distinguish it from other similar species in its genus and family.
uses: Bocquillonia codonostylis is a plant species used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
